source-scout.description: Codebase exploration using Constellation code intelligence. Use @source-scout for: 'What does this codebase do?', 'Where is the auth logic?', 'Find usages of X'

impact-investigator.description: Change impact assessment using Constellation code intelligence. Use @impact-investigator before: renaming, deleting, or modifying functions/classes

dependency-detective.description: Dependency analysis using Constellation code intelligence. Use @dependency-detective for: circular imports, module coupling, dependency health
